_doc: Eldritch Moon (EMN) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/emn.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 70C / 60U / 42R / 12M. Collation: sequential. Occasional foil (1:67) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Small set with 21 double-faced cards (including 3 pairs of meld cards). DFC slot is in addition to standard game cards (commons reduced from 10 to 9). Land slot is a basic land (from SOI) or checklist; lands appear ~1/3 of the time. US printing sequential collation. 36 packs per box. AUDIT 2026-06: land-slot outcome re-pointed to set SOI — EMN prints no basics; packs used Shadows over Innistrad basics (collation-facts; checklist alternative not modeled).

draft.tagline: 9 commons · 3 uncommons · 1× rare/mythic · 1 basic land · foil 1:67
